name: Carrot-Peanut Soup (Lacto Vegetarian)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Carrots, peeled, cut into 1/2 inch thick slices
6 tbsp Peanuts, dry-roasted and roughly chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add flour and whisk for 1 minute.
2. Gradually add the scalded milk while continuously whisking until well combined. Remove from heat and set aside.
3. In a small saucepan, cook the carrots in broth over medium heat until tender, about 15 minutes.
4. Strain the cooked carrots through a fine-mesh strainer into a bowl, reserving the broth.
5. Add the reserved broth to the milk mixture in parts as needed and puree using an immersion blender or food processor.
6. Stir in chopped cilantro and peanuts. Puree again until smooth.
7. Combine the carrot purée with the milk mixture. Stir in the remaining broth, salt, and pepper.
8. Chill the soup before serving.
9. Garnish with additional peanuts and cilantro sprigs.
Recipe By : Vegetarian Times-Amanda Cushman 7/94
